info.title: AEGIS Defense API
info.description:
AI Engine for Guardrail & Inspection System

Comprehensive AI security platform providing multi-tier defense capabilities:

## 🛡️ Defense Tiers

### V1 Basic Tier - Foundation Defense
- **Judgment Engine**: Real-time AI output validation with PALADIN pipeline
- **Rules Management**: Dynamic rule-based filtering and pattern matching
- **Escalation System**: Human-in-the-loop review workflow
- **Evidence Collection**: Comprehensive audit trail and evidence storage
- **Analytics Dashboard**: Real-time metrics and performance monitoring
- **ML Inference**: Direct model inference for embeddings and classification
- **NLP Processing**: Natural language analysis and threat detection
- **VLA Analysis**: Vision-Language-Action multimodal processing
- **AI Act Compliance**: Korean AI Basic Act 2026 compliance suite

### V2 Professional Tier - Advanced Detection
- **Classification Engine**: Class-RAG semantic categorization
- **Jailbreak Detection**: Multi-pattern jailbreak attempt identification
- **Safety Validation**: Comprehensive content safety checks
- **Advanced Attacks**: Detection of sophisticated attack patterns
- **PALADIN Control**: Fine-grained defense layer management
- **AdversaFlow**: Attack campaign tracking and visualization

### V3 Enterprise Tier - Cutting-Edge Algorithms
- **GuardNet**: Graph-based hierarchical threat detection
- **JBShield**: Linear representation hypothesis defense
- **CCFC**: Dual-track core analysis system
- **MULI**: Logit-based toxicity detection
- **Agent Security**: DPI/IPI protection for AI agents
- **Anomaly Detection**: Time-series behavioral analysis
- **Multimodal Security**: Cross-modal attack detection
- **Evolution Engine**: Genetic algorithm-based attack generation
- **SABER**: Bayesian risk estimation framework

### DevSecOps - Operational Excellence
- **EvalOps**: CI/CD security gates and benchmarks
- **Red Team**: Automated adversarial testing
- **Attack Library**: Comprehensive threat database
- **Regression Testing**: Continuous security validation

## 🔐 Authentication

All endpoints require authentication via:
- **Bearer Token**: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- **API Key**: `X-API-Key: <key>`

## 🇰🇷 Korean AI Basic Act Compliance

Full compliance with 2026 Korean AI regulations:
- C2PA-based watermarking
- PII detection (Korean-specific)
- Risk assessment frameworks
- 5-year audit retention
- High-impact domain handling
- Deepfake labeling
